# Stigmem

> Stigmem is an open-source federated knowledge fabric and intent protocol for AI agents — a shared, persistent substrate where agents and humans write typed, traceable facts that travel across tools, platforms, and organizations.

Stigmem = Stigmergy + Memory. Like ant colonies coordinating through pheromone trails, agents leave typed facts in a shared environment that guides future agents — no central coordinator, no point-to-point overhead. Facts have expiry and confidence scores so the substrate stays fresh.

**License:** Apache-2.0
**Status:** v1.0 stable
**Repository:** https://github.com/Eidetic-Labs/stigmem

## Core Concepts

Every fact is an immutable record with the shape:
`(entity, relation, value, source, timestamp, confidence, scope)`

- **entity** — a `stigmem://` URI identifying the subject
- **relation** — a typed predicate (e.g. `prefers_language`, `owns`, `blocked_by`)
- **value** — the claim
- **source** — the agent or user that asserted it
- **confidence** — float 0–1 expressing certainty
- **valid_until** — ISO-8601 expiry; facts decay when unreinforced
- **scope** — `local | team | company | public`; controls replication boundary

Contradictions between nodes are surfaced as first-class records, never silently overwritten.

## Getting Started

- [Quickstart](https://docs.stigmem.dev/en/latest/docs/learn): run two federated nodes in minutes with `docker compose up`
- [Install guide](https://docs.stigmem.dev/en/latest/docs/install): environment variables, auth, single-node and multi-node setups
- [MCP adapter](https://docs.stigmem.dev/en/latest/docs/adapters/mcp): connect Claude, Cursor, or any MCP-compatible agent to a Stigmem node

## Specification

- [Full spec v1.0](https://docs.stigmem.dev/en/latest/reference/spec/): complete wire format, federation protocol, and adapter ABI
- [Fact shape §2](https://docs.stigmem.dev/en/latest/reference/spec/atomic-fact-shape): entity URI scheme, HLC timestamps, confidence, decay
- [Federation §6](https://docs.stigmem.dev/en/latest/reference/spec/federation): PeerDeclaration handshake, pull replication, scope enforcement
- [Wire format §5](https://docs.stigmem.dev/en/latest/reference/spec/wire-format): HTTP API — assert, query, retract, conflict resolution
- [Intent envelope §4](https://docs.stigmem.dev/en/latest/reference/spec/intent-envelope): goal, constraint, preference, handoff (draft — feedback wanted)
- [Adapter ABI §12](https://docs.stigmem.dev/en/latest/reference/spec/adapter-abi): MCP, Paperclip, OpenClaw integration contracts

## API Reference

Base URL: `http://<node-host>:<port>`

Key endpoints:
- `POST /v1/facts` — assert a fact
- `GET /v1/facts` — query facts (filter by entity, relation, scope, confidence)
- `DELETE /v1/facts/{id}` — retract a fact
- `GET /v1/facts/{id}` — retrieve a single fact
- `POST /v1/lint` — validate entity URIs and relation names
- `POST /v1/decay/sweep` — trigger TTL expiry sweep
- `POST /v1/synthesis` — synthesize a summary across a scope
- `GET /.well-known/stigmem` — node metadata and peer discovery

Interactive API explorer: `http://<node-host>:<port>/docs`

## MCP Tools (for AI agents)

When connected via the MCP adapter, agents get:
- `assert_fact` — write a typed fact to the node
- `query_facts` — retrieve facts matching entity/relation/scope filters
- `lint_scope` — validate all entity URIs in a scope
- `synthesize_scope` — generate a prose summary of a scope's facts
- `resolve_contradiction` — choose a winner between conflicting facts
- `subscribe_scope` — stream fact assertions in real time

## SDKs

- [TypeScript SDK](https://docs.stigmem.dev/en/latest/docs/sdk/typescript): `@stigmem/client`
- [Python SDK](https://docs.stigmem.dev/en/latest/docs/sdk/python): `stigmem-client`
